description: A wide, panoramic landscape painting showing a vast flat field at dusk. The foreground is dark earth and golden-brown grass. The horizon line is low, with silhouetted trees and a small structure visible against the sky. The sky occupies the upper third, displaying bands of pink, purple, and blue with horizontal clouds catching the last light of sunset. The overall palette is warm golds and dark browns below, transitioning to pink and purple above. The atmosphere is still and expansive.
